Export.zv: IRIS for UNIX (Ubuntu Server LTS for x86-64 Containers) 2026.1 (Build 234U)

Method.name: OnInit
Method.Implementation: set tSC = ##super() quit:$$$ISERR(tSC) tSC set ..Adapter.SMTPServer = "mailpit" set ..Adapter.SMTPPort = 1025 quit $$$OK

Method.name: OnMessage
Method.Implementation:
set tSC = $$$OK set pResponse = ##class(Ens.StringResponse).%New()
try { set msg = ##class(%Net.MailMessage).%New() set msg.From = ..From do msg.To.Insert(pRequest.Email) set msg.Subject = "Order Confirmed - "_pRequest.SKU set msg.IsBinary = 0 set msg.IsHTML = 0 do msg.TextData.WriteLine("Your order has been confirmed.") do msg.TextData.WriteLine("") do msg.TextData.WriteLine("SKU: "_pRequest.SKU) do msg.TextData.WriteLine("Quantity: "_pRequest.Quantity) do msg.TextData.WriteLine("") do msg.TextData.WriteLine("Thank you for shopping with HoleFoods!")
set tSC = ..Adapter.SendMail(msg) quit:$$$ISERR(tSC)
set pResponse.StringValue = "Email sent" } catch ex { set tSC = ex.AsStatus() }
quit tSC

Method.name: OnMessage
OnRequest
Method.Implementation:
set tSC = $$$OK
set tSC = ..SendRequestSync("OrderProcessor", pRequest, .tOrderResponse) quit:$$$ISERR(tSC)
set result = tOrderResponse.StringValue
set emailSent = "0"
if $piece(result, ":", 1) = "OK" { set emailSC = ..SendRequestSync("EmailOperation", pRequest, .tEmailResponse) set emailSent = $select($$$ISOK(emailSC): "1", 1: "0") }
set tOrderResponse.StringValue = tOrderResponse.StringValue_":"_emailSent set pResponse = tOrderResponse quit tSC

Method.name: OnProcessInput

XData.name: ProductionDefinition
XData.Data: <Production Name="HoleFoods.Interop.Production" LogGeneralTraceEvents="false"> <Description>Order processing with email confirmation</Description> <ActorPoolSize>2</ActorPoolSize> <Item Name="OrderService" Category="" ClassName="HoleFoods.Interop.BS.OrderService" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="true" Schedule=""> </Item> <Item Name="Router" Category="" ClassName="HoleFoods.Interop.BP.OrderRouter" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="true" Schedule=""> </Item> <Item Name="OrderProcessor" Category="" ClassName="HoleFoods.Interop.BO.OrderProcessor" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="true" Schedule=""> </Item> <Item Name="EmailOperation" Category="" ClassName="HoleFoods.Interop.BO.EmailOperation" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="false" Schedule=""> <Setting Target="Adapter" Name="SMTPServer">mailpit</Setting> <Setting Target="Adapter" Name="SMTPPort">1025</Setting> </Item> </Production>

Method.name: PlaceOrder
Run
Method.Implementation:
set tSC = $$$OK try { write "Adding Stock column to HoleFoods.Product...",! set tSC = ..AddStockColumn() quit:$$$ISERR(tSC)
write "Seeding out-of-stock product...",! set tSC = ..SeedOutOfStock() quit:$$$ISERR(tSC)
write "Registering REST web application...",! set tSC = ..RegisterWebApp() quit:$$$ISERR(tSC)
write "Copying web pages to /csp/user/...",! set tSC = ..CopyWebPages() quit:$$$ISERR(tSC)
write "Starting production...",! set tSC = ..StartProduction() quit:$$$ISERR(tSC)
write "Setup complete.",! } catch ex { set tSC = ex.AsStatus() do $system.Status.DisplayError(tSC) } quit tSC

Method.name: AddStockColumn
SeedOutOfStock
RegisterWebApp
CopyWebPages
Method.Implementation:
set tSC = $$$OK try { set dest = "/usr/irissys/csp/user/"
set tSC = ##class(%File).CopyFile("/tmp/src/order.html", dest_"order.html", 1) quit:$$$ISERR(tSC) write "Copied order.html",!
set tSC = ##class(%File).CopyFile("/tmp/src/thankyou.html", dest_"thankyou.html", 1) quit:$$$ISERR(tSC) write "Copied thankyou.html",!
set tSC = ##class(%File).CopyFile("/tmp/src/thankyou-noemail.html", dest_"thankyou-noemail.html", 1) quit:$$$ISERR(tSC) write "Copied thankyou-noemail.html",! } catch ex { set tSC = ex.AsStatus() } quit tSC

Method.name: StartProduction
